mapper.insert: insert into notice_attachment(notice_id, file_name, file_size, file_url, file_content_type) values(#{noticeId}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileContentType})
insert into notice_reply(writer_id, notice_id, content) values(#{writerId}, #{noticeId}, #{content} )
mapper.select: select * from notice where classroom_id=#{classroomId} order by created_at desc
select * from notice_reply where notice_id=#{noticeId} order by created_at asc
